title: Russian Cherry Puff Pancakes
description: Delicious and traditional Russian-inspired cherry-filled pancakes with a crispy puff pastry exterior.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of puff pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, vanilla, and milk.
Add melted butter and mix until well combined.
Place a tablespoon of cherry filling in the center of each pastry circle.
Fold the pastry in half to form a triangle or fold the edges to form a square.
Place the filled pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with a little bit of milk and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
